name: adb-mcp-photoshop
description: AI Agent for Adobe Photoshop: 99 tools (selection, adjustments, painting, layer styles, vector, animation, batch, neural filters) exposed to LLMs via the MCP protocol.
long_description: Fork of Mike Chambers' adb-mcp, extended to 99 Photoshop tools across selection, color/adjustment layers, painting, layer styles, vector shapes/paths, frame animation, batch processing, and neural filters. Exposes Adobe Photoshop to any MCP-capable AI client (e.g. Claude Desktop).
